wizard.title: Publish property

summary.title: Summary
summary.tip1: Use a clear and precise title.
summary.tip2: Describe the location, condition and highlights of the property.
summary.tip3: Upload bright, sharp photos in good quality.
summary.tip4: Carefully review price, area and address before publishing.

wizard.submitSuccess: The listing is ready for the final upload.
wizard.subtitle: Create your listing step by step

page.title: Publish property professionally
page.subtitle: Create your listing step by step – with basic info, location, photos and final review.

stepReview.descriptionMain: Now review all details of your property. Before final publishing, cover image, price, location and description should be complete.
stepReview.check1: Is a suitable cover image selected?
stepReview.check2: Are price and size details correct?
stepReview.check4: Is the description clear and professional?

stepInfo.descriptionMain: Enter the most important details about your property. This information forms the basis for the final listing.
stepInfo.title: Title
stepInfo.titlePlaceholder: For example: Modern 4-room apartment with balcony
stepInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the property as clearly and attractively as possible.
stepInfo.checkBeforeContinue: Please review your information before continuing.

stepLocation.descriptionMain: Enter the exact location of the property. This helps interested users orient themselves and improves discoverability.
stepLocation.locationNotePlaceholder: For example: Quiet residential area, good public transport connection, schools and shopping nearby.

stepPhotos.descriptionMain: Upload high-quality photos. The first image will be used as the cover image and is the most important one for interested users.
stepPhotos.uploadHint: JPG, PNG or WEBP – up to 12 images
stepPhotos.coverHint: Note: The first image will be used as the cover image of your listing.
stepPhotos.emptyText: Add at least one image to continue to the next step.
